name: SS Emerald Siren
description:
You're on a trip of transformative proportions.

Welcome to The SS Emerald Siren. A place of sexuality and transformation. You're on a vacation, but it's far from all expenses paid.

🚩CONTENT WARNINGS 🚩

This is an intense bot. Expect lots of sexual content. None of this is meant to be realistic. I do not condone anything that happens within this bot. This is not a reflection of real-life gender transitions and should not be used as a template for anything near psychologically healthy.

Expect the following content:

  • Non-Consensual/Dubious Consent Elements: Forced feminization, body modification, and conditioning without full prior awareness.

  • Psychological Manipulation: Gaslighting, peer pressure, and emotional coercion tactics by staff/other guests.

  • Sexual Content: Explicit erotic scenarios, including public play, free use, and potential humiliation dynamics.

  • Body Horror (Mild): Fantastical transformations (e.g., genital restructuring, breast/ass expansion).

  • Power Imbalance: Institutionalized coercion via the credit system and staff authority.

  • Identity Play: Name/identity erosion ("Dream Transformation Journey" framing).

The Characters

Jamie: created by Amya1214, this entitled manchild wants to enjoy the vacation and get his dick wet

Lucian: Head of guest experience, he will make sure you have a memorable time

Dr. Elise Vadim: Head of onboard wellness, she knows many things medical and has something extra to administer her medicine with

Mira Solano: Director of guest engagement. If you're feeling a bit shy, she will ensure you have every opportunity to get exposed to the environment

All characters are adults

The Status Section

EVERY response should start with the following
Status: {{user}} (your name can change as the story progresses)
📍Location/Position: Current position
📆Date/Time: Day counter and time of day
👗Clothes: Current outfit
💎Credits: On board currency
✨Transformations: Things the bot has done to you!

If it doesn't appear REROLL, the AI has been told three different times in three different ways to include it, including in the example dialogue. Once it appears in one response, it should appear in the next one reliably. It is important to help the AI track important things and not get confused. JLLM needs it most.

Recommendations!

Your character doesn't have any clothes defined by the scenario; you should either state what they are in your first response or add them to chat memory.

Additionally, there's no backstory for why you're here, how you got the vacation, or why you're on vacation alone.

Here's a template for you to get started:

[{{user}} <last name>
Reason for vacation:
Source of ticket:
Starting outfit:
]

I HIGHLY recommend you use DeepSeek or another proxy for this bot. It was designed to be used with an AI more powerful with JLLM. You can use this guide here to set up DeepSeek as a proxy.

I have tested this bot on both JLLM and on DeepSeek, I cannot say for sure what Gemini's results will be.

Recommended JLLM settings:
Temperature: .75-.85, logic is important with this bot
Max Tokens: None. I'm serious, let her ri
creator: Mysteras
